visual_description: The older man with gray hair in a light gray suit stands between two men in dark clothing inside a dimly lit room with tiled walls and signage. He holds a yellow envelope, looks to his right, then down, and extends his hand toward the man on his right. The man on the right, wearing a dark jacket, looks at a small object in his hand while the man on the left watches.
audio_description: The central man speaks while the surrounding men remain quiet, with ambient background noise audible.
